title: Constitutional README can survive storage-layer restore/update as constitutional

claimAdjudication.claim: Constitutional README can survive storage-layer checkpoint restore or SQL update as a constitutional memory even though parser/discovery exclude README files.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Looked for README-specific exclusion in index-scope.ts, checkpoint restore validation, vector-index update guard, and focused tests. Parser/discovery have the exclusion, but storage-layer guards and tests do not.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: The team may intentionally rely on parser/discovery to prevent README rows. That does not cover restore/update paths, which operate on already-materialized database/checkpoint rows.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if checkpoint restore and memory_update are explicitly declared out-of-scope for constitutional README invariants, or if an unseen DB constraint rejects those rows before these functions run.

title: Review strategy artifact map has stale runtime paths
Checklist evidence is not resolvable as file:line citations

name: Scope file existence
details: 32/35 prompt-listed paths resolved exactly; stale entries use code-graph or handlers/memory-parser.ts instead of live code_graph/lib and lib/parsing paths.

name: Checklist evidence replay
details: 62 CHK-* items found; 0 had concrete file:line citations in checklist.md.

name: ADR implementation mapping
details: ADR-001 through ADR-012 have corresponding implementation surfaces in reviewed files.

name: A2 PE downgrade
details: UPDATE and REINFORCE decisions downgrade to CREATE on canonical-path mismatch; same-file null canonical_file_path falls back to file_path.

name: B2 fromScan propagation
details: memory_index_scan passes fromScan true; direct indexSingleFile omits it; memory-save defaults omitted origin to direct.

name: SSOT predicate edge cases
details: z_future, z_archive, external, and segment boundaries are covered; constitutional README is not encoded in the shared predicate.

name: SQL-layer downgrade arithmetic
details: Tier update, audit attempt, vector status update, projection refresh, and cache invalidation run inside update_memory_tx.

name: Checkpoint atomic restore
details: Rejected rows abort clearExisting transaction before clear/insert, but constitutional README passes the current predicate.

name: Focused regression coverage
details: A2 and B2 coverage is strong; storage-layer constitutional README poisoning is not covered.
